name: Linear Brief Sync
description: Catch up an existing product brief with changes in its linked Linear Issue: re-fetch via `linear get-issue`, diff Linear-sourced fields against the current brief, present section-level before/after for PE approval, and write only the approved changes. Refuses when brief Status is Executing. Protected fields (Outcome, Scope, Success metrics, Appetite, Spec map) are never overwritten. Pure choreography — composes the `linear` skill by name, never by path.

skills.name: linear
skills.purpose: Re-fetches the Linear Issue for diff. Hard dependency — there is no degraded path without it.

input.arguments: a brief path (e.g., docs/product/briefs/my-feature.md). The brief must contain a `**Linear:**` field with an issue identifier. If absent, the user is asked to provide the identifier explicitly.

artifacts: docs/product/briefs/<slug>.md — updated in-place with only the PE-approved changes from the Linear diff.
